components.name: Terminal Button
components.description: Functional action button with sharp corners and terminal prefix.
components.css: .ds-btn-terminal { background: transparent; color: #27c93f; border: 1px solid #27c93f; padding: 8px 24px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); border-radius: 0; } .ds-btn-terminal:hover { background: #27c93f; color: #0c0c0c; } .ds-btn-prefix { font-weight: bold; margin-right: 8px; }

components.name: System Card
components.description: Information container with tonal layering and system borders.
components.html:
// CPU STATUS

System operating at nominal parameters.
components.css: .ds-card-system { background: #111111; border: 1px solid #333333; padding: 24px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 0.2s; } .ds-card-system:hover { border-color: #27c93f; } .ds-card-title { color: #ffbd2e; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .ds-card-body { color: #888888; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Status Indicator
components.description: Live status signal with pulse animation.
components.css: .ds-status { display: flex; items-center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; color: #d4d4d4; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-status-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #27c93f; border-radius: 50%; position: relative; } .ds-status-dot::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: #27c93f; border-radius: 50%; animation: ds-pulse 2s infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.8; } 100% { transform: scale(2.5); opacity: 0; } }

narrative.overview: A live diagnostic interface for a high-performance server. Dark, tactile, and functional.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The primary Binary Green accent is used on ≤10% of any given screen.

rules.name: The Prefix Rule
rules.body: Interactive elements or section headers lead with ❯, ./, or //.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat and defined by borders. Shadows are prohibited.

dos: Do use monospaced fonts for all text elements
Do use ❯ or ./ to prefix interactive links
donts: Don't use drop shadows or blur effects
Don't use soft gradients or generic proportional fonts
